goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should be in the 'south'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be 'in the same area as the hotel' and should be in the type of 'nightclub'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'attraction' by '01:15'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should be in the south
The hotel should include free wifi
Make sure you get whether they have free parking
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the hotel and should be in the type of nightclub
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the attraction by 01:15
Make sure you get contact number and car type
